headline: Compliance-first release: webhook reliability, audit controls, and team safety for enterprises.

themes.user_facing_summary: Webhook delivery is now fully idempotent and failures are fully visible. Double-delivered events from retries are eliminated, and webhook delivery status now appears in your activity log with retry information and error details.
supporting_changes: Fix duplicate webhook delivery on retry by respecting idempotency key
Surface webhook delivery failures in the activity log UI
Document the idempotency-key contract for webhook subscribers

themes.user_facing_summary: Audit and billing reports are now exportable as CSV, and retention policies are configurable per workspace to meet SOC 2 and HIPAA requirements. Exports now respect your workspace timezone for accurate compliance records.
supporting_changes: Add CSV export to billing reports
Allow custom retention policies per workspace (default 90 days)
Correct timezone handling in audit log CSV export

themes.user_facing_summary: Concurrent role edits by multiple admins now serialize correctly, preventing one admin's changes from being silently overwritten by another.
supporting_changes: Resolve race condition when two admins edit the same role concurrently

notable_changes: Webhook delivery is now fully idempotent — eliminates double-billing risk from retries
Audit and billing reports exportable as CSV with timezone-aware timestamps
Configurable retention policies (90-day default) for SOC 2/HIPAA compliance
Webhook delivery failures with retry status now visible in activity log
Role edit race condition fixed — no more silent overwrites by concurrent admins
customer_voice: Enterprise teams flagged webhook retries as causing reconciliation headaches and audit risk, reported that compliance reporting consumed hours monthly, and experienced silent role-edit collisions on busy teams. This release resolves all three pain points with idempotency fixes, audit controls, and team-safe collaboration.
